items.title: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
items.dek: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.
items.body: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.

items.title: German court convicts Iraqi couple of enslaving Yazidi girls
items.dek: The pair, named only as Twana H.S. and Asia R. A., left Germany for Iraq in 2015 and became members of the Islamic State group.
items.body: The pair, named only as Twana H.S. and Asia R. A., left Germany for Iraq in 2015 and became members of the Islamic State group.
